title: BEM-961 commit SHA fallback patch
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text()
old = "commit_sha = os.environ.get('COMMIT_SHA', '')"
new = "commit_sha = os.environ.get('COMMIT_SHA', '') or os.environ.get('GITHUB_SHA', '')"
if old not in text:
    raise Exception('target commit_sha line not found')
text = text.replace(old, new, 1)
p.write_text(text)
changed_files.append(str(p))
ops_applied.append('bem961_commit_sha_fallback_patch')
"""
Create file governance/reports/BEM961_COMMIT_SHA_FALLBACK_PATCH.md with content BEM-961 | COMMIT SHA FALLBACK PATCH | 2026-05-31 | 14:56 (UTC+3)

Этап: 11/12 (92%)
Дорожная карта BEM-931 foundation: 14/14 (100%); release gates: 0/4 (0%)

Чек-лист:
✅ Patch target: Write result files now uses COMMIT_SHA or GITHUB_SHA fallback.
✅ Purpose: stop Deno status from returning commit_sha=null when changed_files exist.
⚠️ GITHUB_SHA fallback is remote workflow SHA, not full release proof by itself.
❌ Release PASS remains blocked until remote content SHA, production Telegram, live LLM runtime and Claude re-audit gates pass.

| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |
|---|---|---|
| Runner path | .github/workflows/codex-runner.yml Write result files | commit_sha was read before commit/push and stayed null |
| Safe fallback | GITHUB_SHA is non-null workflow commit SHA | better proof than null; still not release PASS |
| Следующее действие | BEM-962 run create-file verification to confirm Deno returns non-null commit_sha | verify patch by new task status |
